mapper.select: select cla_num, cla_title, cla_goal, cla_thumb, user_name, cla_status, cla_startdate, cla_enddate, cla_maxstu, cla_views from class c inner join users u on c.user_num = u.user_num where c.user_num = #{userNum} order by c.cla_num desc

select cla_num, cla_title, cla_goal, cla_thumb, user_name, cla_status, cla_startdate, cla_enddate, cla_maxstu, cla_views from class c inner join users u on c.user_num = u.user_num
c.user_num = #{userNum}
and cla_title like '%' || #{pageMaker.keyword} || '%'
order by cla_num desc

select cla_num, cla_title, cla_content, cla_goal, cla_category, cla_thumb, cla_complete, user_name, cla_status, cla_startdate, cla_enddate, cla_maxstu, cla_views from class c inner join users u on c.user_num = u.user_num where cla_num = #{claNum}
mapper.insert: insert into class(cla_num, cla_title, cla_content, cla_goal, cla_category, cla_thumb, user_num, cla_startdate, cla_enddate, cla_maxstu, cla_complete) values (#{claNum}, #{claTitle}, #{claContent}, #{claGoal}, #{claCategory}, #{claThumb}, #{userNum}, #{claStartDate}, #{claEndDate}, #{claMaxStu}, #{claComplete})
mapper.select: SELECT SEQ_CLASS.NEXTVAL AS cla_num FROM DUAL

SELECT c.cla_num, c.cla_title, c.cla_category, c.cla_content, c.cla_goal, c.cla_complete, c.cla_startdate, c.cla_enddate, c.cla_maxstu, c.cla_status, c.cla_views, u.user_name, u.user_photo, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM classapply ca WHERE ca.cla_num = c.cla_num) AS applyCnt FROM class c INNER JOIN users u ON c.user_num = u.user_num
c.cla_status = '승인완료' AND c.cla_enddate >= SYSDATE
AND c.cla_title LIKE '%' || #{pageMaker.keyword} || '%'
AND c.cla_category = #{category}
ORDER BY c.cla_views DESC
ORDER BY (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM classapply ca WHERE ca.cla_num = c.cla_num) / c.cla_maxstu DESC
ORDER BY c.cla_num DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM class c
c.cla_status = '승인완료' AND c.cla_enddate >= SYSDATE
AND c.cla_title LIKE '%' || #{pageMaker.keyword} || '%'
AND c.cla_category = #{category}
